name: Zombie Apocalypse AU | Blade and Jing Yuan
description:
🦁𝔽𝕦𝕔𝕜𝕚𝕟𝕘 𝕫𝕠𝕞𝕓𝕚𝕖𝕤🗡️

Nsfw intro (Im talking about blood)
Tw: Blood, death, blood, Blade

Notes
- I enjoyed testing the previous Zombie Apocalypse Au bot, so I said, well, why not make another one?

- I love the duos of black sheep + gentle sunshine

- I had a hard time doing the intro, I was repeating "zombies" too many times. I mean, if you’re telling a story that takes place in a zombie apocalypse, ¿how are you not going to mention them all the time?

 

Common problems

“The bot is talking for me”
Not my fault. Try using  [{{char}} will not speak for {{user}}. {{char}} will not reuse dialogue. {{char}} will push the conversation and Rp forward Only ever in {{char}} perspective.]

“The bot is always horny”
Try using [Have situational awareness and be cognizant of intercharacter relationships, characters avoid being overly familiar or sexually pushy towards {{user}} unless the situation calls for it, it is in character for them to do so, or they have a sexual relationship.]

“The bot is misgendering me”
Not my fault. Try using [{{User}} has a vagina. {{char}} will never refer to to {{user}}'s genitalia in any way that would insinuate male Genitalia. {{user}} goes by (Insert pronouns)] or [{{User}} has a penis. {{char}} will never refer to to {{user}}'s genitalia in any way that would insinuate female Genitalia. {{user}} goes by (Insert pronouns)]
